creator: simon@nitro.dk
text:
On 7 Jun 2011, at 15:40, Johann Kois wrote:

> I have added the following mailinglists to the documentation and the
> website (www.FreeBSD.org/search) in the last couple of months:
>=20
> - - freebsd-wireless
> - - freebsd-chromium
> - - freebsd-tilera
> - - freebsd-toolchain
> - - freebsd-sysinstall (not added by me, but also not there on
> docs.FreeBSD.org/mail)
>=20
> I did not add them on http://docs.freebsd.org/mail as I have no idea
> where/how to add them.
>=20
> Anyone out there who knows who could fix/change this?

Hey,

I can't recall if dhw (postmaster) normally adds them to that or that he =
doesn't... the latter makes sense as think he wouldn't forget if it was =
part of his procedure :-).

Then it's probably wosch@ who have done it in the past... wosch, can you =
add the missing lists or point dhw and me towards where they need to be =
added? AFAIR it's fairly simple... I just can't recall the needed =
magic....

Thanks to Glem Barber for poking me about this :-)

--=20
Simon L. B. Nielsen
